## Author checklist

- [ ] The issue and acceptance criteria are satisfied.
- [ ] The diff contains no unrelated cleanup.
- [ ] Tests would fail for the defect or missing behavior.
- [ ] Required documentation and plan status are updated.
- [ ] No secret or sensitive output is included.
- [ ] Remaining risk is stated honestly.
